personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | ETL, Cloud Data Platforms, AI-Driven Automation

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise engineering experience, including large-scale ETL pipeline design, data modeling, and cloud-focused platform optimization. Strong hands-on background in Python, SQL, AWS, and analytics-oriented data architecture, with proven delivery in fast-moving environments. Active user of AI-assisted engineering workflows (including Claude Code/Cursor) to automate implementation and accelerate delivery quality.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and maintained ETL/ELT pipelines (Python, Pandas, SQL) ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints for enterprise analytics and operational reporting.
Designed and optimized data models and storage patterns for high-volume historical analysis, performance forecasting, and decision support.
Implemented data quality checks, cleansing, and validation workflows to improve reliability of downstream datasets and reporting.
Partnered across engineering and analytics stakeholders to deliver scalable data solutions aligned to business and platform priorities.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Supported cloud-oriented modernization and monitoring improvements for customer-facing platforms.
Used telemetry analysis to identify bottlenecks and guide data-informed optimization decisions.

experience.title: Senior Consultant (APM SME)
bullets: Built extraction and reporting workflows that improved operational visibility and actionable system metrics.
Worked with large technical organizations to improve monitoring, diagnostics, and engineering process maturity.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led large-scale data migration initiatives from 200+ MySQL nodes to Oracle RAC with focus on integrity, performance, and reliability.
Built validation/testing workflows supporting stable rollout in high-throughput production systems.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Performed data-driven performance diagnostics and delivered structured recommendations to improve service quality and stability.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: Enterprise Telemetry ETL Platform
projects.description: Built scalable ETL workflows and analytics-ready datasets to support operational decision making and long-horizon forecasting.

projects.name: AI-Powered Engineering Workflow Automation
projects.description: Applied AI coding tools to automate repetitive engineering tasks and accelerate delivery of data and software artifacts.
